item.title: The FBI Redacted Trump’s Name in the Epstein files. But their job is to prosecute, not bury it.
item.description: The bureau’s FOIA team tasked with conducting a final review of the records blacked out the names before higher-ups said last month that releasing the documents ‘would not be appropriate or warranted.’
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: The continued Grift of the United States
item.description: United States has yet to stand up to the tyrannical leader that has trapped them. We do not have hope here, they flaunt their pedophilia in our faces. And laugh at us while many of us go hungry and unhoused.

item.description:

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @lorecrash makes earrings from polymer clay.
27 Man Tax: Yasiel Puig
“The mountains are calling and I must go.” ― John Muir I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Seriously y'all. Coming to only comment "omg that's AI" bums me out. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out, play some trivia, talk about movies & tv and, apparently, plucked chicken buttholes. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

Ansel Adams. Maybe I should make a post of some photographers I like. Hmm.
I've always been old enough to read fairy tales.
Mmm maybe not.
This is how I will see them from now on.
Sandpaper
FO <3
That cat looks like he has seen some things and is ready to blackmail you.
...yeah, the kids.
I never found out how she did that.
The dream.
item.dc:creator: WAH666

item.title: Attempts there was
item.dc:creator: larskongo

item.title: Celebrating a year of transition, and finding the will to live.
item.description:
While I understand that imgur has a no selfie rule, my understanding is that one of the rare exceptions is progress pics.
Please excuse my shirt. I need to spot clean it.
Life's been a hell of a lot more complex and painful then I signed up for, but hey! I'm here to live it, and that's beautiful.
I mean, I lost a friend, do to them wanting more, but not being ready for it. I don't know how to feel about that. Heady, I guess.
Anyway, I started my transition about a year ago now and it's definitely had more ups than downs. Found out that I'm finally my type(safe), softer skin, softer hair, breasts, the will to live, less stress, less horny, more horny. I've also had a number of friends tell me that they want relationships. That's... Weird. I'm not going to lie. The downsides have mostly been social, and that's because people are assholes.
item.dc:creator: villainousdescent

item.title: I cant be the only one right?
item.description: My mom made me a ceramic pig at one of those pottery paint places when I was really small. It was cute, but I never really expressed an interest in pigs. For years and years I got pigs added to my room constantly.. Hundreds of pigs. My room was painted pig pink. Parents told other family I loved pigs. Around 10 I finally got them to stop with the pigs and got rid of the forced collection. I had a stuffed panda that Id had since I was tiny, and then randomly I bought another stuffed panda because it was unique and cute. Cut to parents showering child me with pandas. Ceramic ones, posters, jewelry, candle ones. Every holiday and birthday, pandas. My room, no joke, was painted black and white. Sure Pandas are cute but like.. I didnt even like them much, I had just the nostalgia one and the one other. By the time I moved out I had 76 stuffed pandas and hundreds of other panda items. I ended up giving it all away save for my nostalgia one. Also please dont get me wrong, I know people were trying to be nice by getting me christmas and birthday gifts but it felt like such a cop out from my family. My sister went through the same thing with carousels being forced on her for all holidays. My very nerdy video game loving brother? Western stuff. It happens in my adult life as well. I have a mini collection of some niche things in my house but I dont want to tell anyone in case they latch onto it and I end up with a ton of things I feel obligated to hang onto that I dont care about. I do collect mugs, but I dont just buy all the mugs. I am pretty picky with the ones I buy, have about 50 right now, all very unique. (One even from Imgur secret Santa a few years ago that says "You dont owe assholes shit" and I love it lol) I collect Fallout (Video Game) stuff, but not all the stuff. I dont like funkos and the like, because they look goofy to me.. Im pretty picky and wont just buy anything Fallout just because the name is on there, Im probably the asshole. I just think part of the fun collecting is actually hunting and finding the things you specifically like. Anyways.. thats all. Just kept thinking about this today lol
item.dc:creator: thecitrinewitch

item.title: Journey - Loving Reaper
item.description: The artist is Jenny Jinya, the series is Loving Reaper, this webtoon can be found at https://m.webtoons.com/en/canvas/loving-reaper/journey/viewer?title_no=353275&episode_no=70 Shout out to @WildlifeNomads Their recent post: ? The Most Trafficked Animals on Earth https://imgur.com/gallery/MOGLFi4 Got me thinking about this specific comic. Also, just a heads up, all of Jenny Jinya's works hit hard, you have been warned.
item.dc:creator: IgnisInvictus

item.title: Imgur has become too corporate.
item.description: OEU is being shut down, you can't hotlink directly to images in an album (at least, not from mobile), everything that made imgur great is gone. Even the community is questionable at times, but at least the Discord was a great place to hang out... I'm betting most people here don't remember why imgur was created. Reddit didn't have the capability to upload images directly, and there were no quality services that offered hotlinking and long-term image hosting. Everything imgur set out to be has now been removed.
item.dc:creator: kruug
